title: Import one approved source (CIViC EWSR1/FLI1 evidence) → assertions with provenance
context: The first sourced slice proves the end-to-end pipeline on one approved CC0 source with full provenance. Only open / public-domain / openly-licensed sources (CIViC CC0, Open Targets CC0, Reactome, license-checked PMC open-access subset); COSMIC, OncoKB, DrugBank, any non-open DB and all controlled-access / patient-level data (dbGaP, EGA, biobanks, EHR) are out of scope and refused. No patient data; all therapeutic-target content is research evidence labeled 'not medical advice'. See PLAN.md.
objective: Import the approved CIViC EWSR1/FLI1 evidence into Gene/Fusion/Disease/EvidenceAssertion/SourceDocument assertions, each carrying a resolvable provenance link, and pass CI.
acceptanceCriteria: Records from one approved source mapped to Gene/Fusion/Disease/EvidenceAssertion/SourceDocument.
100% of new assertions carry a resolvable provenance link (source ID + license + release + method + evidence level).
Conflicting/superseded source statements retained with separate provenance + evidence levels.
Passes CI (SHACL + Biolink + provenance + not-advice-label + allow-list) before review.
output: A provenance-bearing assertion dataset (KGX/JSON-LD) from CIViC EWSR1/FLI1 evidence, committed via PR.
